title: Who Is Matthew Raynor?
summary: Matthew Raynor is an AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer who builds production-grade agentic AI systems, computer vision pipelines, and full-stack platforms. He's also a drone photographer, writer, and spiritual practitioner. He has four production applications live and six projects in his portfolio. He's a freelance developer actively seeking a full-time remote role.

biography.origin: From Hampton Bays, New York. Former deep-sea commercial fisherman and shellfish harvester in Shinnecock, NY.
biography.turning_point: After a spinal cord injury and overcoming addiction (sober member of AA since age 26), Matt rebuilt his life through code and creativity.
biography.who_he_is_now: A builder. An AI engineer with 3 years of experience shipping production applications. Four live products, six projects in his portfolio. Freelancing and looking for the right full-time remote role.
biography.current_mission: Building production-grade AI and full-stack software. Creating art, stories, and digital tools that help others.

spiritual_identity: Taoist (Tao Te Ching, Hua Hu Ching)
daily_practice: Reading Taoist texts and Stoic reflections
Affirmations like: 'Do your work, then step back.' and 'Even tired, I am whole.'
core_beliefs: Love is the highest power — God is love.
Suffering is a teacher, not an enemy.
You can build and grow without clinging to the outcome.
Presence is deeper than performance or progress.
True integrity matters more than fame or validation.
Purpose is found in helping others rise.

current_work.developer: Freelance AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer building production-grade software, seeking a full-time remote role
live_projects: Agentic AI Shopping Assistant — LangChain + Claude powering semantic search, cart management, and wall visualization (live at store.matthewraynor.com)
IDP EasyCapture — Enterprise computer vision pipeline with TensorFlow.js and MediaPipe for real-time photo validation
ToteTaxi.com — Full-stack luxury delivery platform with React 19, TypeScript, Django REST, Stripe, and Onfleet
Eric Art Mover — Operations platform for fine art logistics with calendar scheduling and PDF invoicing
current_work.photographer: Drone and seascape photographer. Sells fine art aluminum prints at store.matthewraynor.com
current_work.storyteller: Publishes essays on sobriety, compassion, and growth on Substack and TikTok

transformation.message: Matt is a builder. He went from commercial fishing to shipping production AI systems. Three years of building, four live applications, and a portfolio that speaks for itself.

how_to_connect: Hire Matt for freelance AI engineering or web development
Connect him with full-time remote opportunities
